# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in this repository! This is a personal educational
repository containing ICSE Computer Science practice programs.

## How to Contribute

### Reporting Issues
If you find an error in any program (logical, syntactical, or otherwise):

- Open an issue at:
  https://github.com/indpriyanshuraj/ICSE-COMPUTER-JAVA/issues
- Clearly describe the problem and which file it is in

### Suggesting Improvements
If you have a better or alternate solution:

- Open a GitHub Discussion at:
  https://github.com/indpriyanshuraj/ICSE-COMPUTER-JAVA/discussions
- Share your approach and reasoning

### Pull Requests
Pull requests are welcome for:

- Fixing incorrect programs
- Adding missing ICSE topics or programs
- Improving code readability or comments

Please keep pull requests focused on a single fix or addition.

## Code Style

- Use clear, readable variable and method names
- Add comments explaining logic where necessary
- Follow standard Java conventions (for Java programs)

## Academic Integrity

Please do not submit programs from this repository as your own school
assignments. This repository is meant for reference and learning only.

## Code of Conduct

All contributors are expected to follow the
[Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
